arts.ttl: Player ‘heads to Glasgow’ for move to Celtic – Brendan Rodgers’ side agree deal for exit
arts.sum: On Wednesday, Celtic sealed a 1-0 win over Young Boys in the Champions League and it was Kyogo Furuhashi’s last appearance for Brendan Rodgers’ side. That’s according to Le Parisien, who state Celtic have reached an agreement with Stade Rennais for the striker’s transfer. arts.ttl: Stuart Kettlewell agrees with Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers over winter break but won't make excuses for Motherwell results
arts.sum: Fir Park boss has a major injury headache to deal with but insists he'll tackle any situation put in front of him.

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel shares how the Young Boys bench reacted to Celtic Park Champions League noise

arts.ttl: World media reacts as Celtic send Young Boys into 'the valley of tears' and prove fortune favours the brave
arts.sum: Celtic are into the knockout stages of the Champions League for the first time since 2013
Brendan Rodgers praises his Celtic side after they "kept believing" to snatch a late win over Young Boys and create a "bit of history" by reaching the Champions League play-off round.

arts.ttl: Knockouts a 'massive achievement' for Celtic - Sutton
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundit and former Celtic striker Chris Sutton reflects on the SPL champions' victory over Young Boys, and what it means for the club to reach the Champions League knockout football for the first time in 12 years.

arts.ttl: Rodgers 'proud' as Celtic end 12-year Champions League wait
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers is "very proud" to have steered Celtic through to the play-off round, ending the club's 12-year wait for Champions League knockout football.

arts.ttl: Kyogo nears £10m Celtic exit as Jota linked with return
arts.sum: Rennes are in advanced talks to sign Celtic forward Kyogo Furuhashi for around £10m.
